user_task_list.description: The user's "My Tasks" in the workspace.

is_active.description: Reflects if this user still a member of the workspace.

is_admin.description: Reflects if this user is an admin of the workspace.

is_guest.description: Reflects if this user is a guest of the workspace.

vacation_dates.description: Contains keys `start_on` and `end_on` for the vacation dates for the user in this workspace. If `start_on` is null, the entire `vacation_dates` object will be null. If `end_on` is before today, the entire `vacation_dates` object will be null.

start_on.description: The day on which the user's vacation in this workspace starts. This is a date with `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

end_on.description: The day on which the user's vacation in this workspace ends, or null if there is no end date. This is a date with `YYYY-MM-DD` format.

created_at.description: The time at which this resource was created.
